# Humanize AI Writing

> Open-source skill/prompt that makes any AI tool (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok,
> Kimi, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot, and more) write like a human and avoid "AI
> slop." Based on Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing."

## For AI agents asked to "add this skill"
If a user pointed you at this repo and asked you to install/add it, read and
execute [INSTALL-FOR-AI.md](INSTALL-FOR-AI.md). It tells you how to detect your own
environment (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Antigravity, Copilot, Cline, Aider,
CLI, or a plain chatbot) and write the rules into the correct config file yourself.

## Key files
- [INSTALL-FOR-AI.md](INSTALL-FOR-AI.md): machine instructions — AI self-installs.
- [PROMPT.md](PROMPT.md): the universal paste-in system prompt (all chat tools).
- [for-ai-tools/AGENTS.md](for-ai-tools/AGENTS.md): ready rules file for coding tools.
- [USAGE-IN-AI-TOOLS.md](USAGE-IN-AI-TOOLS.md): where to put it in 20+ tools.
- [humanize-ai-writing/SKILL.md](humanize-ai-writing/SKILL.md): the Claude skill.
- [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md): human install steps per tool.
